title: new game
author: corbin
body:
hi guys
today i just published one of my newest web games - wrath
in this game, you can shoot places up idk
there are other modes like dingus, murderer mystery, heist, co-op and versus, etc.

updates will mostlikely come consistently i dont know
based off of no mercy 3 and unheard
(but its a hotline miami type game)
